workspaceRoot.description: OpenClaw workspace root. Used to resolve default logs/ and projects/sevo/.

eventsPath.description: Path to the plugin event log file. Relative paths resolve from workspaceRoot.

sevoRoot.description: SEVO project root. Relative paths resolve from workspaceRoot.

sevoDistPath.description: Compiled SEVO dist directory. Relative paths resolve from sevoRoot.

sevoDataPath.description: SEVO data directory. Relative paths resolve from sevoRoot.

cacheTtlMs.description: TTL for bridge availability/module cache and failure backoff.

stageAgentMap.description: Optional stage → { tier, agentId, timeout } overrides.
